roles.heading: Uhlelo olulodwa labo bonke
roles.subheading: Noma ufuna ukubheka nje, ukujoyina umdlalo, noma ukuphatha – Footeee ikuhlomisile.

guest.title: Isivakashi
guest.longDescription: Bheka yonke imidlalo ezayo, bona imininingwane yezinkundla, futhi uhlole ukutholakala kwabadlali – konke ngaphandle kwe-akhawunti. Kulungele abalandeli abangajwayelekile.

player.title: Umdlali
player.longDescription: Joyina imidlalo ngokuthinta okukodwa, bona ukuthi ubani omunye odlalayo, futhi uthole izaziso uma ithuba livuleka noma umdlalo uzoquala.

manager.title: Umphathi
manager.description: Vumela Footeee inakekele umhlaba wakho webhola!
manager.longDescription: Ukulawula okugcwele phezu kwemidlalo, amaqembu, nabadlali. Dala imidlalo, abela amaqembu, landelela ukuza, futhi uphathe umphakathi wakho webhola.

privacy.title: Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo
privacy.intro: Footeee ("thina", "okwethu") isebenzisa uhlelo lokusebenza lwe-Footeee lweselula ("Uhlelo") naleli webusayithi. Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza indlela esiqoqa, esisebenzisa, esiveza, nesivikela ngayo ulwazi lwakho uma usebenzisa Uhlelo kanye nezinsizakalo ezihlobene.
privacy.section1Item1: Ulwazi lwe-akhawunti (isib., igama, ikheli le-imeyili, imininingwane yokungena ngendlela ephephile).
privacy.section1Item2: Ulwazi lokusetshenziswa kohlelo (isib., imidlalo oyidalayo/oyijoyinayo, amaqembu, izinkundla, nokuxhumana).
privacy.section1Item3: Idatha yedivayisi/yobuchwepheshe (isib., uhlobo lwedivayisi, inguqulo ye-OS, inguqulo yohlelo, ukuhlolwa).
privacy.section2Item2: Ukuhlinzeka ngezici eziyinhloko njengokudala umdlalo, ukujoyina, nokuphatha amaqembu.
privacy.section3Text: Singase sabelane ngolwazi kuphela njengoba kudingeka ukusebenzisa insizakalo, ukuthobela izibopho zomthetho, noma ukuvikela amalungelo nokuphepha. Isibonelo, singase sisebenzise abahlinzeki bengqalasizinda (ukusingatha, i-imeyili, njll.) abacubungula idatha egameni lethu ngaphansi kwezivikelo ezifanele.
privacy.section4Text: Sisebenzisa izinyathelo zobuchwepheshe nezinhlelo ezifanele ukuvikela ulwazi lwakho (isib., HTTPS, izilawuli zokufinyelela). Ayikho indlela yokudlulisa noma yokugcina enokuphepha okungama-100%, ngakho asikwazi ukuqinisekisa ukuphepha okugcwele.
privacy.section5Text: Sigcina ulwazi lomuntu siqu uma nje kudingeka ukuhlinzeka ngensizakalo kanye nezinjongo zebhizinisi ezisemthethweni (isib., ukuthobela, ukuphepha, ukuxazulula izingxabano), ngaphandle uma isikhathi eside sokugcina sidingwa ngumthetho.
privacy.section6Text: Ngokuya ngendawo yakho (kuhlanganisa i-UK/EU), ungase ube namalungelo okufinyelela, ukulungisa, ukususa, noma ukukhawulela ukucutshungulwa kwedatha yakho yomuntu siqu, kanye nokucela ukudluliselwa. Ukusebenzisa la malungelo, xhumana nathi.
privacy.section7Text: Footeee ayenzelwanga izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13. Asiqoqi ngamabomu ulwazi lomuntu siqu lwezingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13.
privacy.section8Text: Singase sibuyekeze le nqubomgomo ngezikhathi ezithile. Izibuyekezo zizofakwa kuleli khasi nelusuku olusha oluthi "Ibuyekezwe kokugcina".

deleteData.title: Susa Idatha Yami
deleteData.description: Unelungelo lokucela ukususwa kwe-akhawunti yakho nedatha yomuntu siqu ehlobene. Sicubungula izicelo zangaphakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-30.
deleteData.successMessage: Isicelo sakho silungisiwe. Sicela uthumele i-imeyili evuleke kuhlelo lwakho lweposi. Sizosicubungula zingaphakathi kwezinsuku ezingu-30.
deleteData.scopeFull: Konke — susa i-akhawunti yami nayo yonke idatha
deleteData.scopeData: Idatha kuphela — gcina i-akhawunti kodwa ususe idatha yomsebenzi
deleteData.emailRequired: Sicela ufake i-imeyili exhunywe ku-akhawunti yakho.
